summary: The implementation covers all 8 requirements with a fully functional endless runner game using React Three Fiber. The game includes character movement, collectibles, obstacles, progressive difficulty, dual controls (keyboard + mouse), score tracking, anime-inspired visuals, and proper asset loading from the public directory. No missing requirements identified. However, the backend includes score persistence functionality (addScore/getScore) that was explicitly listed as a non-goal (leaderboard/persistent high scores), constituting a hallucinated feature.

hallucinated_features.description: Backend score persistence system with addScore and getScore functions
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly lists 'Leaderboard or persistent high scores' as a non-goal. The backend/main.mo file implements a scores array with public functions to add and retrieve scores, which provides persistent score storage capability that was not requested.
